MemoryVaultPro ← Back to Dashboard
🔒

Encryption Visualizer

Interactive visualization of the end-to-end encryption process for your memories.

How It Works

1️⃣

Data Input

Your memory data is prepared for encryption

2️⃣

AES-256 Encryption

Military-grade encryption is applied

3️⃣

IPFS Storage

Encrypted data is stored on IPFS with content addressing

4️⃣

Blockchain Anchor

Hash is anchored to Base blockchain for immutability

⚠️ Full interactive visualization coming in v2.0

© 2026 VaultAI Inc. Secure memory for the AI age.
